results.title: Marte's tiebreaking homer in 8th after 4-run inning against Skenes helps Reds beat Pirates 6-4
results.description: Pinch-hitter Noelvi Marte hit a tiebreaking, two-run homer in the eighth inning after Cincinnati scored four runs off Paul Skenes in the second, and the Reds beat the Pittsburgh Pirates 6-4. Given a 1-0 lead on Konnor Griffin’s first-inning homer,...
